title: melastoma album
intro: Melastoma album, also known as the melastoma or Malaysian honey flower, is a flowering plant species in the family Melastomataceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and improving digestion, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, melastoma album is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application for skin conditions.
